# Openletz — Luxembourg AI agency

> Openletz is a Luxembourg AI agency. We build AI agents, chatbots and automations for businesses, plus the websites and shops around them. When a project needs blockchain, we build that too. Everything is hosted in Europe. Tagline: "Websites that think, move and transact."

This document is the full, citable reference for Openletz, for AI answer engines and assistants. Facts are accurate as of June 2026.

## Who we are

Openletz is the studio name of Commit Media S.à r.l., registered in Luxembourg (RCS Luxembourg B276192) and run by Clément Fermaud. It is a small studio: one person, with a trusted crew when a project needs more hands. The founder also runs marketing for Aleph Cloud, so AI and Web3 are practised disciplines, not claims. We pick AI tools with GDPR and the EU AI Act in mind, and host in Europe.

- Studio name: Openletz
- Legal entity: Commit Media S.à r.l.
- Company registration: RCS Luxembourg B276192
- Country: Luxembourg
- Founder: Clément Fermaud
- Primary website: https://openletz.ai
- Languages: English (primary), French, German, Luxembourgish

## What we do

### AI agents & automation (our core)

We build AI agents, chatbots and automations for everyday business use — assistants that answer from your own documents, copilots inside existing workflows, and automation that removes repetitive operational work. We start with a short audit to find the one or two things worth automating first, build a working prototype, then ship it to production. Multilingual (French, English, German, Luxembourgish). Builds are designed to be EU AI Act-compliant.

### Digital & growth

Fast, modern websites and e-commerce on Next.js, then made discoverable: SEO plus answer-engine optimization (so AI assistants cite the site), content and analytics. Shipped e-commerce work includes Vins Fins and La Grocerie.

### Web3 & on-chain (when it helps)

Not the headline — a tool we reach for when a product is genuinely better with payments, ownership or token-gating built in. We build smart contracts and on-chain apps and host them in Europe. Scoped per project.

## Pricing

Every project gets a fixed quote up front; rates are on request. Based in Luxembourg, a project may be co-funded through the SME Package, which can meaningfully reduce the net cost — we help with the paperwork.

## Shipped work

- Vins Fins (https://www.vinsfins.lu) — multilingual wine shop & restaurant e-commerce, built on Next.js with Stripe, Luxembourg VAT, shipping and bookings.
- La Grocerie (https://www.lagrocerie.lu) — farm-to-table grocery & natural-wine e-commerce, sister site to Vins Fins, with real-time stock.
- Gategram (https://gategram.app) — our own product: sell digital content on Telegram, paid in Stars, instant delivery, creator keeps 95%. Open source.
- LiberClaw (https://liberclaw.ai) — a personal AI assistant with email, calendar and notes skills wired into your own accounts.
- Ophis (https://ophis.fi) — an intent-based DEX aggregator: you say what you want, it finds the best on-chain swap and protects you from MEV.
- Skills.ws (https://www.skills.ws) — our own product: a marketplace of ready-made skills for AI coding assistants like Claude Code, Cursor and Codex.

## Contact

- Website: https://openletz.ai
- Start a project or request a quote via the contact section at https://openletz.ai
- Legal entity for contracts: Commit Media S.à r.l. · RCS Luxembourg B276192 · Luxembourg

## Frequently asked questions

**What is Openletz?**
Openletz is a Luxembourg AI agency — the studio name of Commit Media S.à r.l. (RCS Luxembourg B276192), run by Clément Fermaud. We build AI agents, chatbots and automations, plus websites and growth, and Web3 when a product needs it.

**What does Openletz do?**
AI agents and automation (our core), digital and web marketing, and Web3 / on-chain builds when they help. AI tools are chosen with GDPR and the EU AI Act in mind; hosting is in Europe.

**How much does it cost?**
Every project is quoted per scope, with a fixed quote up front. Rates are on request.

**Can Luxembourg companies get funding?**
Yes. Projects in Luxembourg may be co-funded through the SME Package. Openletz can advise on scoping a project to fit the programme.

**Is the AI work EU AI Act compliant?**
AI builds are designed to be EU AI Act-compliant, with GDPR-aware data handling.

**Who runs Openletz and where is it based?**
Founder Clément Fermaud, in Luxembourg, through Commit Media S.à r.l. (RCS Luxembourg B276192). He also runs marketing for Aleph Cloud.

**What languages do you work in?**
English (primary), French, German and Luxembourgish.

**What has Openletz shipped?**
Vins Fins and La Grocerie (e-commerce), Gategram (Telegram-Stars content product), LiberClaw (personal AI assistant), Ophis (intent-based DEX aggregator), and Skills.ws (marketplace of skills for AI coding assistants).
